title: Croatian Corn Flatbread
description: Earthy Croatian dish featuring corn arepa filled with mozzarella cheese, this shaggy and festive flatbread is perfect for any meal. It is shojin-friendly and made with mantecare-emulsify for a rich flavor.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine cornmeal, salt, sugar, and yeast.
Gradually add water to the bowl, stirring with a fork until the dough comes together.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 4 equal pieces and roll each into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk shape.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat and brush with olive oil.
Cook the flatbreads for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Spread a quarter of the manteca on each flatbread, then top with mozzarella cheese.
Serve the flatbreads hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.

axes.primaryIngredient: corn arepa filled with mozarella cheese
